content: CLI package structure: Commander-based, each command in src/commands/<name>.ts exporting make<Name>Command(), dashboard renderer in src/dashboard/renderer.ts, storage factory in src/storage.ts, output helpers in src/output.ts. All commands take --db <path> and --json flags.

name: commander-parent-option-conflict
description: Commander parent-subcommand option conflict: when parent command has both action/options AND subcommands with same option name (--db), use enablePositionalOptions() on parent to prevent parent from consuming subcommand's options.

content: dashboard.ts (live ANSI terminal loop with setInterval + raw TTY stdin) is excluded from vitest coverage since it cannot be unit-tested without mocking I/O infrastructure. Add it to vitest.config.ts coverage.exclude.

SisuStorage.getLease(id) and updateLease(id) take the lease.id (lease_xxx), NOT the lease.runId (run_xxx). CLI commands that accept runId from user must first call listLeases() and find by l.runId === runId to get the lease.id.

makeRunCommand accepts optional RunAgentRuntime parameter for test injection; default production runtime spawns claude binary directly via node:child_process (no @sisu/runtime-openclaw dep in CLI package.json)

makeMigrateCommand: Pool from pg, PostgresStorage.runMigrations(pool) in action, --database-url (fallback to DATABASE_URL env) + --dry-run flag; pool.end() in finally. openPostgresStorage() in storage.ts mirrors openStorage() but async, calls runMigrations then returns PostgresStorage instance.
makeServeCommand uses Node's built-in 'node:http' module (not Fastify) since package.json is outside builder scope — avoids dependency changes while implementing full REST API

cli-generated package structure: SisuApiClient in src/client.ts (typed fetch wrapper per endpoint), CLI commands in src/index.ts (Commander subcommands per resource group), openapi/sisu-v1.yaml is the source of truth for all endpoints; package is @sisu/cli-generated, bin is sisu-api
